reviews.comment:
La atención más o menos, falta de insumos en el servicio compras, los baños sucios!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service is average, the lack of supplies in the shopping service, the bathrooms are dirty!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0dU5Pa1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en medio de la cordillera , antes o despues cruzar para obligada para abastecerse de combustible , poco amables los empleados , cafe horrible

(Translated by Google)
An oasis in the middle of the mountain range, a must-stop before or after to refuel, unfriendly employees, horrible coffee
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0bTQyeDNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta es la última estación de servicio antes de salir hacia Chile ojo que hay horio de cruce de la frontera

(Translated by Google)
This is the last gas station before heading to Chile. Note that there are border crossing times.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOekxLb2VBEAE

reviews.comment: Not to place a sign that the next gas station is in 200 km - it's a crime
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMUtTNk1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. La mala atención del personal  bordea el mal trato. El shop no merece la categoría de " Full". No tienen bebidas en las heladeras, no hay comidas, no te cargan agua en los termos, no hay wifi etc.
Las habitaciones del hospedaje mal mantenidas y sucias. Hicimos el reclamos y no tuvimos respuestas.
El personal de la playa de combustibles también poseen mala trato hacia el cliente.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The staff's poor treatment borders on rudeness. The shop doesn't deserve the "Full" category. There are no drinks in the refrigerators, no food, they don't refill water bottles, there's no Wi-Fi, etc.
The hotel rooms are poorly maintained and dirty. We filed a complaint and received no response.
The staff at the gas station also treat customers poorly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxajV2c1lnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxaThLVzBnRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Luiz Alves dos Santos Júnior (Luiz Apache .'.)

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I went there twice and both times they were out of fuel. The first time I arrived at 8 am and left at 2 pm. If possible, be prepared not to use this place or go prepared for this "surprise". The convenience store is terrible.

(Original)
Passei por lá duas vezes e nas duas estavam sem combustível.  Na primeira vez cheguei às 8 da manhã e saí de lá às 14h. Se possível, se prepare para não usar esse lugar ou já vá preparado para essa "surpresa". A loja de conveniências é sofrível.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxOG96a3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) This gas station is located on the border; we stopped to refuel and have something to eat and drink at the convenience store. It doesn't have a huge variety of products, but it serves customers well, and the restrooms are clean. The gas station is located right by the roadside.

(Original)
Posto que fica na fronteira, paramos para abastecer e comer e beber algo na loja de conveniência, não tem grande variedade de produtos mas atende bem os clientes , banheiros limpos. Bem na beira da pista está localizado o posto
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaE1La3JBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la única YPF en la a frontera a veces hay que hacer cola para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF station on the border; sometimes you have to queue to get fuel.
